name: ca-backend
description: - 🔐 Secure User Authentication (JWT) - 💬 Real-Time Messaging with Socket.IO - 🟢 Online/Offline User Status - 📷 Image Sharing - 👤 User Profile Management - 🔔 Instant Message Delivery - ⚡ Zustand for Global State Management - 🎨 Responsive UI with Tailwind CSS & DaisyUI - 🤖 Arcjet Bot Detection - 📧 Email Validation - 🚦 Rate Limiting - 🔒 Protected Routes & Secure APIs - 📱 Mobile-Friendly Design
